question.question: Such {a1} the chaos that the event had to be cancelled entirely.

variants.text: Such {a1} the chaos that the event had to be cancelled entirely.

hints.hint:
After negative/restrictive adverbials (Never, Hardly, Not only, Seldom, Only then…), **subject-auxiliary inversion** is required.
The inverted auxiliary must match the tense of the original clause. Only the auxiliary comes before the subject.

Po przysłówkach o znaczeniu ograniczającym (Never, Hardly, Not only, Seldom…) wymagana jest inwersja podmiotu i operatora.
Inwertowany operator musi odpowiadać czasowi zdania. Tylko operator przechodzi przed podmiot.

«Such was + підмет» — інверсія «to be» для підсилення ступеня стану або явища.
«The chaos» — підмет в однині; Past Simple форма «to be» для однини — «was».

chatgpt_explanations.question: Such {a1} the chaos that the event had to be cancelled entirely.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Incorrect. «had» does not fit the grammatical structure required in this sentence.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Such {a1} the chaos that the event had to be cancelled entirely.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Niepoprawnie. «had» nie pasuje do wymaganej struktury gramatycznej tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Such {a1} the chaos that the event had to be cancelled entirely.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Had» утворило б Past Perfect або конструкцію з «have»; тут потрібна форма «to be» — «was».

chatgpt_explanations.question: Such {a1} the chaos that the event had to be cancelled entirely.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Had» утворило б Past Perfect або конструкцію з «have»; тут потрібна форма «to be» — «was».

chatgpt_explanations.question: Such {a1} the chaos that the event had to be cancelled entirely.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Correct. «was» is the right form here based on the grammar rule for this sentence type.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Such {a1} the chaos that the event had to be cancelled entirely.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Poprawnie. «was» jest właściwą formą zgodnie z regułą gramatyczną tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Such {a1} the chaos that the event had to be cancelled entirely.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Was» — правильна форма: «Such was the chaos» (однина); підкреслює надзвичайний масштаб хаосу.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Such {a1} the chaos that the event had to be cancelled entirely.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Was» — правильна форма: «Such was the chaos» (однина); підкреслює надзвичайний масштаб хаосу.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Such {a1} the chaos that the event had to be cancelled entirely.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Incorrect. «were» does not fit the grammatical structure required in this sentence.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Such {a1} the chaos that the event had to be cancelled entirely.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: Niepoprawnie. «were» nie pasuje do wymaganej struktury gramatycznej tego zdania.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Such {a1} the chaos that the event had to be cancelled entirely.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Were» вживається для множини; «the chaos» — абстрактний іменник у однині.

chatgpt_explanations.question: Such {a1} the chaos that the event had to be cancelled entirely.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation: «Were» вживається для множини; «the chaos» — абстрактний іменник у однині.
